label: fix5_1of10

line_window_definition.fix5_planned: W2 line window 510.58-511.42 keV, inherited from current v3p5 exact-position authority.
line_window_definition.old_new_geo_re_status: UNVERIFIED in fix5_benchmarks.json; old values are described as hard-window/narrow-line context but the exact selection contract is not repo-local proven equivalent here.

active_shield_thresholds.fix5_planned: CsI active-shield post-processing threshold 50 keV, same as current v3p5 CsI chain unless Runner/Verifier proves otherwise.
active_shield_thresholds.old_new_geo_re_status: PENDING; exact old threshold and veto implementation not proven equivalent in this Phase 1 evidence file.

compton_fov_definition.fix5_planned: Current Step05 side-entry Compton/FoV classifier against the tilted Be disk, after common Poisson time-axis grouping.
compton_fov_definition.old_new_geo_re_status: PENDING; old new_geo_re exact Compton/FoV selection equivalence was not proven by Builder.

rate_units_and_time_normalization.fix5_expected: cps / s^-1 after Step05; prompt normalized by 1/sum(TT) from fix5 SIM TimeTags; delayed requires fix5 activation-derived ground-state-corrected source and M-sampling audit.
rate_units_and_time_normalization.old_new_geo_re_status: Rate units are cps, but uncertainty and exact normalization equivalence are not quantified in the repo-local fix5 contract.

selection_equivalence_status.reason: Line window, active shield, and Compton/FoV equivalence to old new_geo_re were not deterministically proven in Phase 1.

normalization_equivalence_status.reason: Source-surface/far-field normalization differs: audit records old new_geo_re sphere 35 cm versus current/fix5 60 cm, with area ratio 2.9387755102.

decision_rule: Because decision != ALIGNED, old new_geo_re prompt/delayed numbers may be reported as historical context only and must not be used for pass/fail gating.
next_required_evidence_for_alignment: Old new_geo_re Step05 selection definition including line window, active-shield threshold, and Compton/FoV implementation
Rate normalization audit with comparable TimeTag/exposure accounting
Uncertainty or selected-event support for old benchmark values
